message:
feat(inference): add confidence visualization with safety/gate badges

Implements bead ic9d: maps posterior, expected loss, calibration, and
robustness gates to discrete badge states (SAFE/CAUTION/DANGER,
HIGH/MED/LOW). Separates belief, decision, and permission channels.
12 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
